# example.com

example.com publishes public, canonical content for humans, search engines, and user-directed AI assistants.

## Key Sections

- https://example.com/ - Site home and section map.
- https://example.com/news/ - Short news index.
- https://example.com/articles/ - Expanded articles.
- https://example.com/topics/ - Topic pages.
- https://example.com/projects/ - Project pages.
- https://example.com/about/ - Author/entity page.

## Best Used For

- Understanding the public site structure.
- Finding canonical public pages.
- Traversing brief-to-longform story pairs.
- Discovering topic, project, and author context.

## Do Not Use

- /admin/
- /api/
- private dashboards
- unpublished drafts
- raw logs or analytics
